entity.summary: Non-custodial decentralized perpetual trading platform on Cronos networks offering pooled-liquidity markets, market and limit orders, staking, and very high leverage trading.
entity.notes: Current first-party application and documentation expose live perpetual trading, wallet connection, market and limit orders, pooled MLP liquidity, staking, prediction-market extensions, and Cronos EVM and zkEVM support. Current independently maintained metrics report non-zero perpetual volume, fees, TVL, and open interest. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Moonlander official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Moonlander as a non-custodial decentralized perpetual trading platform on Cronos EVM and zkEVM with pooled liquidity, staking, oracle-backed pricing, market and limit orders, and high-leverage trading.

evidence.title: Moonlander protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL, fees, and open interest, supporting active classification.
